What’s the difference between a Basic Sa: Vad är skillnaden mellan en basförsäljning och obegränsad försäljning?
In the Basic Sale, every user can commit: I basförsäljningen kan alla användare avsätta maximalt cirka OPT-BNB LP-tokens till ett värde av 100 USD. Vi beräknar det maximala LP-beloppet cirka 30 minuter innan varje IFO. Basförsäljningen har ingen deltagaravgift.
In the Unlimited Sale, there’s no limit: I den obegränsade försäljningen finns det ingen gräns för beloppet av OPT-BNB LP-tokens du kan avsätta. Men det finns en deltagaravgift: se nedan.
Which sale should I commit to? Can I do: Vilken försäljning ska jag avsätta till? Kan det vara båda?
You can choose one or both at the same t: Du kan välja en eller båda samtidigt! Om du bara avsätter ett litet belopp rekommenderar vi basförsäljningen först. Kom bara ihåg att du behöver en PancakeSwap-profil för att kunna delta.
There’s only a participation fee for the: Det finns bara en deltagaravgift för obegränsad försäljning: det finns ingen avgift för basförsäljningen.
The 1% participation fee decreases in cl: Deltagaravgiften på 1 % sjunker i steg, baserat på procenten av överflödet från den "obegränsade" delen av försäljningen.
We burn it. The OPT-BNB LP tokens from t: Vi bränner den. OPT-BNB LP-tokens från deltagaravgiften kommer att upplösas. Därefter använder vi BNB-delen för att köpa OPT-motsvarigheten på marknaden och slutligen kastar vi all OPT på veckans tokenbränning.

Thank you for being a day-one user of Pa: Tack för att du använt Pancake-profiler sedan dag ett!

The better your team performs, the bette: Ju bättre ditt lag presterar, desto bättre priser kommer ni att få!

PancakeSwap can and will disqualify any: PancakeSwap kan och kommer att diskvalificera alla lag eller specifika medlemmar som bevisats ha begått skadliga handlingar eller försökt "fuska" på något sätt.
Can I join the battle after it starts?: Kan jag gå med i striden efter att den har börjat?
Sorry, no. You need to register during t: Tyvärr inte. Du måste registrera dig under registreringsperioden innan evenemanget startar.
How do I know if I successfully register: Hur vet jag om jag är registrerad?
At the top of the page, the text in the: Längst upp på sidan kommer texten i knappen "Jag vill strida" att bytas ut till "Registrerad".
How can I see my current rank?: Hur kan jag se min aktuella rankning?
Check Your Score section on the event pa: Kontrollera avsnittet Poäng på evenemangssidan. Du måste så klart ansluta din plånbok.
How do I claim my prize(s)?: Hur löser jag in mitt pris?

\"Buy Instantly\" chooses random numbers: "Buy Instantly" chooses random numbers, with no duplicates among your tickets. Prices are set before each round starts, equal to $5 at that time. Purchases are final.

Tickets must match the winning number in: Tickets must match the winning number in the exact same order, starting from the first digit.
“000006” matches the last digit, but sin: “000006” matches the last digit, but since the first five digits are wrong, it doesn’t win any prizes.
If the digits on your tickets match the: If the digits on your tickets match the winning numbers in the correct order, you win a portion of the prize pool.
Prices are set when the round starts, eq: Prices are set when the round starts, equal to 5 USD in OPT per ticket.
There are two draws every day: one every: There are two draws every day: one every 12 hours.
Once the round’s over, come back to the: Once the round’s over, come back to the page and check to see if you’ve won!
The digits on your ticket must match in: The digits on your ticket must match in the correct order to win.
Here’s an example lottery draw, with two: Here’s an example lottery draw, with two tickets, A and B.
Ticket A: The first 3 digits and the las: Ticket A: The first 3 digits and the last 2 digits match, but the 4th digit is wrong, so this ticket only wins a “Match first 3” prize.
Ticket B: Even though the last 5 digits: Ticket B: Even though the last 5 digits match, the first digit is wrong, so this ticket doesn’t win a prize.
The prizes for each lottery round come f: The prizes for each lottery round come from three sources:
100% of the OPT paid by people buying ti: 100% of the OPT paid by people buying tickets that round goes back into the prize pools.
After every round, if nobody wins in one: After every round, if nobody wins in one of the prize brackets, the unclaimed OPT for that bracket rolls over into the next round and are redistributed among the prize pools.
An average total of 35,000 OPT from the: An average total of 35,000 OPT from the treasury is added to lottery rounds over the course of a week. This OPT is of course also included in rollovers! Read more in our guide to
Prize brackets don’t ‘stack’: if you mat: Prize brackets don’t ‘stack’: if you match the first 3 digits in order, you’ll only win prizes from the ‘Match 3’ bracket, and not from ‘Match 1’ and ‘Match 2’.
Buying multiple tickets in a single tran: Buying multiple tickets in a single transaction gives a discount. The discount increases in a linear way, up to the maximum of 100 tickets:
Projects can submit an application to sp: Projects can submit an application to sponsor a yield farm and/or pool on PancakeSwap via the
The PancakeSwap team will try to respond: The PancakeSwap team will try to respond within a week.
Community Farm qualifiers will be asked: Community Farm qualifiers will be asked to provide the address of the wallet which you’ll use for bidding OPT in the auction.
Core Farm/Pool qualifiers will receive f: Core Farm/Pool qualifiers will receive further directions separately.
During the auction period, if you connec: During the auction period, if you connect your project’s whitelisted wallet to the Auction page, you’ll see a “Place Bid” button during when the auction is live.
You can then commit OPT to bid during th: You can then commit OPT to bid during the auction, competing against other project for one of the available farms.
If your bid was not successful, you can: If your bid was not successful, you can reclaim your OPT on this page.
If your bid was successful, your farm wi: If your bid was successful, your farm will begin at the specified time. The OPT you bid will not be returned to you and will be added to our weekly OPT burn.
So long as you are whitelisted, you’ll b: So long as you are whitelisted, you’ll be able to participate in each new auction.
If two or more projects bid the exact sa: If two or more projects bid the exact same OPT amount and are contending for a spot in the winning bidders, their bids may be invalidated.
Each week, qualifying projects can bid O: Each week, qualifying projects can bid OPT for the right to host a 7-day Farm on PancakeSwap.
